runtime.nonRepeatPolicy: app.js stores recent quiz signatures in localStorage and re-rolls seed when a duplicate signature appears.
runtime.taxonomySource: No fine-grained taxonomy yet; falls back to unit-level generators.

basic.purpose: Drills confirm grammar rules, vocabulary meaning, and standard sentence patterns; all questions are multiple choice.
guardrails: Junior-high English scope only (12-year curriculum grammar sequence + 2000-word list).
Sentences and distractors are generated by quiz-taxonomy.js templates; answers are computed from the same parameters.
No constructed-response items: the official 英語（閱讀／聽力）exam is multiple choice only.
